title: satureja coreana
intro: Satureja coreana, also known as Korean savory, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Korea and parts of China. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Satureja coreana include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health. Satureja coreana can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or oil, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies and modern supplements.
